description: Synthetic Korean drama fixture. Tests romanization variants, plausibility scoring, and multi-speaker normalization.

source.text: - 그, 어휘 구사력이 참…—- [지영] 여기 어디
[민수] 아, 이모, 이모, 이모—이모, 이모! 잠깐만
[수진] 여기 영어로—뭐라고 쓰여 있는 거 같긴 한데
[수진] 아휴, 안 돼—너 오늘은 무조건 쉬어야 돼
[현우] 이마에 피를 흘리고—쓰러져 있단 신고가 들어왔어요
몰라, 그냥 놓을 수 있는 데—싹 다 놔 달라 했어
그냥 자연스럽게 늙는 게—제일 아름다운 거야

translated.text: [Ji-young] Really?
[Ji-young] What do I do!
[Ji-young] No, suddenly—just leave without saying anything
[Jiyoung] No
[Jiyoung] Ah, seriously
[Jiyeong] But,—what's right…
[Jiyeong] You got hurt badly?—Let me take a look
T- that vocabulary...—- [Young-ji] Where are we
[Min-su] Oh, I've—never been here before
[Min-su] I'll do it properly
[Min-su] Just be honest—and tell me what you think
[Min-soo] Namui jipeseo—sinbalina beoseusiji
[Min-soo] Oh, you've been lagging—Since earlier, actually
[Minsoo] Aunt, aunt, aunt!—Aunt! Wait a moment
[Su-jin] Kim Min-su—Is this your bag?
[Su-jin] Hey, this—We should give it to the police station
[Su-jin] Here in English—It looks like it says something
[Sujin] Do you know who the most famous person in the world is?
[Sujin] Ji-young is full of geniuses—even in that company
[Soojin] Ah, anvoe—neo eoloneun munjam bi millayeo doea
[Soojin] Hadaega, hadaga—ah, adan hadaga
[Vowels] I didn't even wash my face.
[Vowels] Crazy guy
[Oo] An emergency call has come in reporting bleeding from the forehead.
[Oo] No, you have to.
[Hyun-woo] Wait
[Tae-ho] Ah, that sounds delicious.
[Tae-ho] Oh, okay.
[Hyun-woo] A person with no blood or tears, really
No wrinkles at all.
I don't know, I just wanted to remove it all.
And on your face—Do you have to do something so artificial?
Just let nature take its course—That is the most beautiful.
